name: Prime Minister's Employment Generation Programme
description: Collateral-free margin money support for manufacturing and service micro enterprises.

name: Credit Guarantee Fund Trust for Micro and Small Enterprises
description: Credit guarantee support for collateral-free loans to micro and small enterprises.

name: PM Vishwakarma
description: Support for traditional artisans and craftsmen with toolkit, training, and credit access.

name: Udyam Registration Support
description: Digital registration help for MSMEs to access subsidies, procurement, and formal benefits.

name: ZED Certification Subsidy
description: Assistance for zero defect zero effect certification and process quality improvements.

name: Lean Manufacturing Competitiveness Scheme
description: Cluster-based support to improve productivity, process efficiency, and manufacturing competitiveness.

name: MUDRA Loan Scheme
description: Micro-credit for entrepreneurs under Shishu, Kishor, and Tarun loan categories.

name: SFURTI Cluster Development
description: Support for formation and development of artisan and village industry clusters.

name: TREAD for Women
description: Credit and grant support for women entrepreneurs through NGOs and institutions.

name: ASPIRE
description: Support for innovation, incubation, and start-up promotion in the MSME ecosystem.

name: IPR Support Scheme
description: Financial support for patents, trademarks, and intellectual property protection.

name: Export Promotion Capital Assistance
description: Support for exporters to upgrade technology, capacity, and export readiness.

name: NSIC Single Point Registration Scheme
description: Vendor registration support for MSMEs to participate in government procurement.

name: Coir Vikas Yojana
description: Technology, training, and welfare support for coir artisans and micro units.

name: Credit Linked Capital Subsidy for Technology Upgradation
description: Subsidy for machinery and technology upgrades that improve productivity and quality.
